title: Theme Studies
description: Three independent studies for the Jewelry CAD Wearable Set theme.
creative_direction: A first-pass single-image package for Jewelry CAD Wearable Set: one core demonstration, one applied system, and one gallery-oriented variation, all focused on credible real-world light, texture, and camera behavior, material physics, optical behavior, and tactile surface detail, technical diagram clarity and callout structure, controlled style language without losing structure, commercial presentation polish and practical product framing.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Theme Studies
en.description: Three independent studies for the Jewelry CAD Wearable Set theme.
